_readme: Per-chain deployment config, keyed by chainId. Copy to bcConfig.json and fill in. rvToken.address: existing wrapped-native/revenue token (WETH9-style deposit()); leave empty to have scripts/deploy.js deploy the bundled RevenueToken mock (local/test chains only). params: ACTMarketplaceEVM initializer values. scripts/deploy.js writes the deployed marketplace address + ABI back into this file.
